specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > 4.3 The Origin of Purpose: Causal Entropic Forces & Negative Entropy > Causal Entropic Forces (CEF) > Meta-Framework Integrations
source_formulae: P0R03670: The TSVF is a physical implementation of Bayesian smoothing. Standard inference updates beliefs based on past evidence. Smoothing is a more powerful form of inference that updates beliefs about the present based on both past and future evidence. The forward-evolving vector is the influence of the past, and the backward-evolving vector is the influence of the future "evidence" (the teleological prior). The CEF-biased probabilities are the result of this optimal, temporally non-local inference process.
test_protocols: preserve TSVF as Bayesian Smoothing: source-accounting boundary
